summary: At 66131d96a869fc317519a66c13ea0e3b0b8d3e1d, the Architecture, canonical Spec, execution-topology replay, public CLI composition, production action-owner wiring, and production-shaped E2E describe and exercise the same bounded guarded path to pr_ready.
inspection_summary: Reviewed the generated spec-consistency request; Story, Architecture, canonical Spec, replay, and test plan; the public CLI, guarded run session, one-command owner, safe-action orchestrator, runtime adapter, and production connectors; and the focused E2E/unit coverage. The topology remains diagnose -> prepare_artifacts -> implement -> verify -> review -> repair (only for needs_changes, replaying verify/review) -> final_prepare. The CLI composes production dependencies into the guarded session; the session injects the owner callbacks without a reverse CLI import. Mutating runtime work requires workspace_write plus local_workspace_only, unavailable capability paths return typed recovery before action start, and final_prepare may yield pr_ready only for the managed worktree's current HEAD with ready_for_pr_create true. The closure has no PR creation, merge, waiver, or external authority seam.
inspection_evidence: HEAD verified with git rev-parse HEAD: 66131d96a869fc317519a66c13ea0e3b0b8d3e1d. The generated request is .vibepro/reviews/story-vibepro-one-command-pr-ready-closure/architecture_spec/review-request-spec_consistency.md. Fresh focused verification passed: node --test test/e2e/story-vibepro-one-command-pr-ready-closure-runtime.spec.ts (4/4, 25.55 s) and node --test test/one-command-pr-ready-closure.test.js (16/16, 58.86 ms). The persisted current-head preparation artifact .vibepro/pr/story-vibepro-one-command-pr-ready-closure/pr-prepare.json also identifies this review HEAD and reports the freshness surface passed.
judgment_delta: Initial concern: the execution-topology replay could be an idealized plan that diverges from public CLI production wiring. Final judgment: cli.js composes production dependencies into createGuardedRunSession, which injects the one-command owner and its callbacks without a reverse CLI import.

Initial concern: pr_ready could be reached from stale or pre-repair evidence. Final judgment: final_prepare and the safe-action orchestrator require current managed-worktree HEAD equality and ready_for_pr_create=true; focused E2E binds the final artifact to the repaired HEAD.

Initial concern: provider fallback could silently cross the capability or human-authority boundary. Final judgment: mutation requests require workspace_write and local_workspace_only, unavailable or insufficient capabilities return typed recovery before start, and focused tests cover the no-PR-create/no-merge/no-waiver boundary.
